summary: Experienced IT technician with more than four years in IT support across user support, identity and access management, hardware upgrades, and process improvement. Strong hands-on experience with Python, Excel automation, Azure AD / Microsoft Entra, Active Directory, Microsoft 365, and day-to-day Windows and Linux administration. Comfortable working directly with users, third-party suppliers, and internal stakeholders to solve operational problems and improve systems.

highlights: Support 600 to 700 users across hardware, Microsoft 365, access control, and third-party applications.
Manage onboarding, enrolment, and user access across Active Directory, Azure AD / Microsoft Entra, and related systems.
Administer SharePoint permissions and user access to maintain appropriate security controls.
Conduct hardware upgrades on PCs and servers to improve performance and reliability.
Built a Windows desktop application in Python to automate cropping student photos for ID badges.
Collaborate with third-party suppliers and maintain software and hardware inventory audits.
Supervised implementation of the SchoolsBuddy activity sign-up system.
Led migration of the visitor management system from Biostore to InVentry.
Oversaw Paxton access control integration with InVentry.
Created posters and manuals to help users connect devices to Wi-Fi and use digital signage.
Identified and escalated a security risk involving an SSD BitLocker encryption bug.
Managed departing user accounts to ensure secure offboarding.
Created email distribution groups and managed shared mailbox permissions in Exchange admin tools.
Supported mobile device setup for BYOD users with BlackBerry Work.
Created a Microsoft Access database template for tracking student behaviour and printing report cards.
Built PowerPoint lesson libraries and differentiated worksheets for English, Maths, and Science classes.
Managed classroom behaviour and supported positive learning environments.
Produced video training materials to help staff use the reporting database effectively.
Created spreadsheets and macros in Google Sheets to support invoice management.
Tutored primary through A-level students in Maths, Further Maths, and Physics.
Set up OneDrive and built Excel templates for invoicing, payslips, and attendance tracking.
Edited and updated the company website and improved the business presence on Google Maps.
Handled customer communication in person, by phone, and by email.
Created written communications for clients and internal administration.
Supported day-to-day business operations and record keeping.

education.institution: Sir George Monoux Sixth Form College
